notes: A portion of protocol revenue (interest on loans, liquidation penalties) automatically flows to buybacks. The "Smart Burn Engine" purchases SKY using accumulated fees.

evidence.name: Smart Burn Engine
evidence.summary: Automated buyback system. When protocol surplus exceeds the buffer threshold, the Splitter routes fees to the Flapper, which purchases SKY on UniswapV2.

evidence.name: Revenue Flow
evidence.summary:
Protocol revenue flows: Stability Fees → Vow (surplus) → Splitter → Flapper → SKY buybacks.

Revenue sources:
- Interest on loans (stability fees)
- Liquidation penalties
- Stablecoin swap fees (PSM)
